intro: I am excited to apply for the Capacity Planning Engineer role at Samsung Semiconductor. My background combines deep capacity planning, forecasting, and bottleneck optimization experience with strong analytics automation, and I am confident I can contribute immediately to fab output and delivery goals.
body: At Citi, I led enterprise capacity planning initiatives and built forecasting models that predicted bottlenecks months in advance, enabling proactive action and better delivery outcomes. I developed Python/PySpark analytics pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints and translated complex constraints into leadership-ready risk summaries and KPIs.

This role's focus on line analysis, capacity-gap closure, throughput optimization, and cross-functional execution aligns directly with my day-to-day work. I have extensive experience partnering with engineering and operations teams to drive measurable improvements in tool performance, resource allocation, and process efficiency through data-driven decision making.
conclusion: I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my planning, forecasting, and performance optimization background can help Samsung maximize constrained-tool capability and overall fab output. Thank you for your consideration.
